description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Changes
• Soyanagi Loop (Kokusai Kogyo Route Hanno 15) bus timetable is now accurate — Previously, NaviTime's data structure caused confusion such as "the same bus shown multiple times for different directions" and "buses to Hanno Station not appearing". Routes have been consolidated and organized to match the actual loop:
• From Hanno Station, you see "Kojo-mae direction" (residential loop); from City Hall, you see "Hanno Station direction" (short return route) — intuitive buttons by use case
• On the countdown screen, stops now appear in actual route order (which direction around the loop)

Fixes
• Shiyakusho-mae / Hanno City Hall consolidated as one stop — Kokusai Kogyo buses used "Shiyakusho-mae" while Muma buses used "Hanno City Hall", but they are the same stop in city operations, so they are now unified under the Muma bus official name.
• Fixed display names like "Soyanagi Loop bound" and "Nakasawa" to show actual destinations — Eliminated the problem of route names appearing as destinations in bus timetables.
• Countdown screen for "bus ride home" — The list of stops now ends at "board → my stop (home)" instead of continuing to the final stop. The "bus boarding" screen continues to show to the final destination.
• Other fixes — Corrected numerous duplicate and misleading bus stop displays.
summary: Myはんのう v1.17.1 リリース
